## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and propose a new top-funnel strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Strategy Proposed:** A new top-funnel content strategy will broaden Aembit's reach by targeting high-volume cybersecurity topics, addressing the "pigeonholing" issue from the current niche focus.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [**Performance:** November sessions hit a new peak, and December is on track to surpass October's total in just one week. The current strategy is effective but limited by the small market size of its niche topics.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 38 articles (mostly glossary pages) are awaiting Aembit's review. Four approved articles are ready for staging by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [**Decision Path:** Dan will review the new topic list in Airtable. If aligned, the proposed Tuesday meeting will be canceled. If not, the meeting will proceed to discuss the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Strategy Rationale

  - [**Performance Metrics:** Sessions and Engaged Sessions are the primary metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Session:** A single visit to the site.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
      - [**Engaged Session:** A session lasting \>10 seconds or including a click. The benchmark is 50% of total sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Current Strategy:** Focus on niche topics (e.g., "agentic AI security") is effective but has a small audience, limiting top-funnel growth.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**New Strategy:** Broaden reach by targeting high-volume cybersecurity topics.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive top-funnel traffic and associate Aembit with broader cybersecurity conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
      - [**Format:** High-level topic overview → Dedicated Aembit POV section.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Reduces Aembit's editing burden, increasing content velocity.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Breach Analysis:** A potential new content type.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture audience attention on trending topics.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [**Condition:** Must connect to Aembit's core non-human identity principles.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Content Pipeline & Production

  - [**Awaiting Review:** 38 articles (mostly glossary pages) are in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Ready to Publish:** 4 articles are approved and will be staged by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Edits:** All outstanding edits will be addressed by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dan:** Review new topic list in Airtable and discuss with the Aembit team.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [**Vivek:** Send a meeting recap.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [**Vivek:** Stage 4 approved articles for publishing by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
  - [**Vivek:** Send a calendar invite for the potential strategy meeting (Tuesday, 11:30 AM ET).](https://fathom.video/share/CqdZzxtomd3XmzAjdE_cNUFJbeKYaUzr?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
